content.body:
Adds matching fields to storage.Doc (mirroring kb.Doc) and updates the
kbDocToStorage / storageDocToKB conversion functions to carry all eight
new fields across the boundary. No behavior change for existing callers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(storage): propagate new memory fields through storage.Doc and conversion helpers
